title: Korean-Style Apple Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry featuring tender apples and spicy Korean chili flakes.

ingredients.name: Tangy Apple
ingredients.notes: Any variety will work, but firmer apples hold up better to stir-frying

ingredients.name: Dense Korean Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: Also known as gochugaru, adjust to desired level of heat

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Oil
ingredients.notes: Vegetable or peanut oil work well for high-heat stir-frying

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds nice crunch and flavor

instructions: Heat stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the sliced apple and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and sesame seeds (if using). Stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the apple mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions.
